recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry the pancetta in a pan until crispy.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and mix in the grated cheeses.
Drain the spaghetti and add it to the pan with pancetta.
Remove from heat and quickly mix in the egg and cheese mixture.
Serve immediately with extra cheese and black pepper.

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add broccoli, bell pepper, and carrot, and stir-fry for 5-7 minutes.
Add soy sauce and stir well.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds before serving.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Cream together butter, sugar, and brown sugar.
Combine flour and baking soda, then gradually mix into the creamed mixture.
Drop by spoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
